name: Setem the Sun-Smith
dialogue: Every sword in the Pharaoh's tomb came out of my forge. Every one.
I shaped weapons for the army that took the desert from the old gods. The desert remembers my hammer.
The sun is my anvil. You are the iron.
Let us see what you fold into.
preBattleLine: Setem cracks his knuckles. The ground around his boots glows molten.
postDefeatDialogue: "Folded a thousand times and never broke. The sun would forge a king of you."
He hands you a still-warm ember. "Show this to the smith in any city. They will know my mark."
prereqBlockedMessage: Setem's forge is cold. "No iron until the Pharaoh has set his seal on you."
